languages.original_text: "On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."

languages.text: "С одной стороны, теперь можно вести наблюдение за развитием ксеноячейки в условиях, приближенных к нативным. С другой стороны, мы имеем дело с крайне опасными генетическими паразитами. Принятое решение неоднозначно".

"On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."
languages.original_text: "С одной стороны, теперь можно вести наблюдение за развитием ксеноячейки в условиях, приближенных к нативным. С другой стороны, мы имеем дело с крайне опасными генетическими паразитами. Принятое решение неоднозначно".

traits.locale_text: "On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."

"On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."

"On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."

languages.text: «Por un lado, ahora podemos observar el desarrollo de las xenocélulas en condiciones cercanas a las nativas. Por el otro, nos enfrentamos a parásitos genéticos extremadamente peligrosos. La decisión no es nada fácil».
languages.original_text: "On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."

traits.locale_text: «Por un lado, ahora podemos observar el desarrollo de las xenocélulas en condiciones cercanas a las nativas. Por el otro, nos enfrentamos a parásitos genéticos extremadamente peligrosos. La decisión no es nada fácil».

languages.text: 「一方では、ゼノ細胞の発達を、ほぼ自然な状態に近い条件下で観察できます。他方では、きわめて危険な遺伝的寄生体を相手にしているのです。下された決定は、とうてい明白なものとは言えません」
languages.original_text: "On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."

traits.locale_text: 「一方では、ゼノ細胞の発達を、ほぼ自然な状態に近い条件下で観察できます。他方では、きわめて危険な遺伝的寄生体を相手にしているのです。下された決定は、とうてい明白なものとは言えません」

languages.text: “一方面，我们现在可以在近乎天然的环境下观察异形细胞的发育。另一方面，我们面对的是极度危险的基因寄生体。这实在不是个容易决断的问题。”
languages.original_text: "On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."

traits.locale_text: “一方面，我们现在可以在近乎天然的环境下观察异形细胞的发育。另一方面，我们面对的是极度危险的基因寄生体。这实在不是个容易决断的问题。”

languages.text: "Einerseits können wie die Entwicklung von Xenozellen jetzt unter nahezu natürlichen Bedingungen beobachten. Andererseits haben wir es aber mit extrem gefährlichen genetischen Parasiten zu tun. Keine einfache Entscheidung."
languages.original_text: "On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."

traits.locale_text: "Einerseits können wie die Entwicklung von Xenozellen jetzt unter nahezu natürlichen Bedingungen beobachten. Andererseits haben wir es aber mit extrem gefährlichen genetischen Parasiten zu tun. Keine einfache Entscheidung."

languages.text: « D'un côté, nous avons l'occasion d'observer le développement xénocellulaire dans des conditions proches des conditions naturelles. De l'autre, nous avons affaire à des parasites génétiques extrêmement dangereux. Il s'agit là d'un dilemme. »
languages.original_text: "On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."

traits.locale_text: « D'un côté, nous avons l'occasion d'observer le développement xénocellulaire dans des conditions proches des conditions naturelles. De l'autre, nous avons affaire à des parasites génétiques extrêmement dangereux. Il s'agit là d'un dilemme. »

languages.text: "Bir yandan artık zeno hücresi gelişimini doğala yakın koşullar altında gözlemleyebiliyoruz. Öte yandan son derece tehlikeli genetik parazitlerle uğraşıyoruz. Alınan karar pek de net değil."
languages.original_text: "On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."
